title: rarab-pack
body:
Optimization & Essential Utilities for Korean

# Optimization

* Inspired by Simply Optimized
* The following option in ImmediatelyFast mode has been disabled due to errors in rendering Korean characters on signs. ```"experimental_sign_text_buffering": false```

# Utilities

* AppleSkin
* Jade
* Essential Mod
* Zoomify
* Mouse Tweaks
* More Chat History
* AdvancementInfo Reloaded
* Chat Heads
* Freecam
* Gamma Utils (Fullbright)

# Utils for Korean

* Korean Chat Patch
* Better Hangul Font
* Language Reload
